jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Ipca Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
